schema_version.description: Version of this schema. Bumped when style entry shape changes; loader runs upgrade_v{N}_to_v{N+1}() chain to migrate user customizations.

styles.description: Map of canonical style key (snake_case ASCII) → style entry.

edges.description: Adjacent style keys (must reference keys present in the same styles map; loader rejects dangling edges).

terminal.description: True when this style has 0-2 edges and is considered a leaf for novelty purposes. Loader uses this to detect sparse-adjacency scenarios.
